title: Amblyanthe squamifera
intro: Amblyanthe squamifera, also known as Japanese bitter gourd or bitter melon, is a plant species belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported health benefits, including its ability to lower blood sugar levels, aid in weight loss, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. Amblyanthe squamifera contains bioactive constituents such as cucurbitacins, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is also used in modern supplement form.
